As someone that's been in the business game in e-commerce way before Facebook ads was popular Understand what really goes into business growth from a wider angle in a wider context now the BPM method For Facebook ads is really about getting you much better stability profitability and growth through Facebook advertising But there are other aspects to consider when we look at growth So this section of the training is you know, we've been through scaling and different strategies You can deploy to spend more and do it in a profitable and consistent way But how about actually growing your business? What other factors are there involved? Well, actually there are only three Leavers that are related to growth. You can either acquire more customers Get those customers you're requiring to spend more or get them to buy again They are the three growth leaders for any business. So if you look at this then so, you know, if you're running your Services or product-based business right now if you can get more traffic through your funnel And you've been all the way through the BPM method your profitable your return on ad spend your cost-prac position Everything is good so far if all you could do is just funnel more people into the top of your ads or You know your website or your sales funnel then with maintaining the same conversion rate and the average order value Etc means that you will grow your business Or let's say for example, you're currently selling a product for $29 on your website and you're doing it marginally profitable Just by increasing the average order value from $29 to $100 with the same amount of people is going to give you growth Then the other side of it is if you're generating You know 10,000 visitors a day and the purchasing X amount of Product or services and you're doing so much revenue The other way to grow it is by getting them to buy again And there are different ways that you can do that but essentially these are the three key levers to growth So as you're going through this journey of understanding and applying the BPM method I hope by this point you have seen the benefit of optimization of scaling of structure and process then the next level for you is Understanding how to now grow into generating more customers getting them to spend more and to create more repeat purchases To enable you to grow your business
